answers.question: Value for field: cover_letter
answers.answer:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my enthusiastic interest in the Senior Manager IT Infrastructure position at Esports Foundation. With over 28 years of extensive experience in enterprise technology, including 10+ years at the CIO/VP level in complex, multi-site global organizations, I am confident in my ability to spearhead your technology agenda and drive transformative growth, particularly within the critical domain of IT infrastructure.

My career journey, predominantly across the UK, Europe, MENA, and Asia-Pacific, has equipped me with a global perspective in defining and executing multi-year technology strategies. I have led comprehensive technology stacks covering infrastructure, enterprise applications (including major ERP transformations like Oracle, SAP S/4 HANA, Microsoft D365), data and analytics, integration fabrics, and robust cybersecurity frameworks. My experience leading IT for a ~$600 Million business unit of DP World, overseeing operations in 20+ countries, and managing infrastructure for a $2.5 Billion restaurant operator (Americana Restaurants) with 2500 locations, aligns directly with your requirement for leadership in large-scale, institutionally governed environments, ensuring high availability and resilience for critical operations.

I bring a clear vision for the future state of enterprise technology and infrastructure, balancing in-house innovation with strategic partner engagements to deliver tangible value. My expertise extends to building resilient data foundations, implementing stringent cybersecurity postures (e.g., DLP, SASE, ZTNA, SIEM, SOC), and ensuring compliance with national and international regulations. My strong commercial instinct and P&L accountability ensure technology investments are strategically aligned and deliver measurable business outcomes. I am adept at translating complex technological landscapes into commercial language for executive committees and boards.

I have a demonstrated history of driving significant initiatives directly relevant to infrastructure, including setting up new data centers, disaster recovery sites, and private clouds, establishing 16x7 offshore helpdesks, and modernizing security systems. My experience also includes successful implementation and modernization of ERP systems, developing innovative mobile and AI solutions to enhance operational efficiency, and establishing service-oriented IT operations with clear metrics. My certifications, including PMP, PRINCE2, and MSP Advanced Practitioner, underscore my commitment to disciplined program delivery and vendor management, crucial for complex infrastructure projects.

Thank you for considering my application. I am eager to discuss how my leadership and technical expertise can contribute to the continued success and growth of Esports Foundation's IT infrastructure.

Sincerely,
Mohit Mendiratta

answers.question: Personal Summary / Professional Profile
answers.answer:
Mohit Mendiratta – CIO / Head of Technology / Digital & AI Transformation Leader

1. 28 years of global leadership experience across UK, Europe, Middle East, Asia-Pacific, and India, driving large-scale technology, digital transformation, and business modernization initiatives.

2. Currently Vice President & Head of IT at DP World's P&O Maritime Logistics business, leading technology for a ~$600M business operating across 20+ countries and 400+ vessels.

3. Former Director of Restaurant Technology at Americana Restaurants, leading a 70+ member technology organization supporting a $2.5B business with 2,500 restaurants across 12 countries.

4. Proven CIO/Technology executive with leadership roles across DP World, Americana, IndiGo Airlines, Havells, V2 Retail, AB Mauri, IBM, HP, and Ascom.

5. Deep expertise in AI, GenAI, Agentic AI, Digital Products, Enterprise Applications, ERP, CRM, Analytics, Automation, Cloud, Cybersecurity, and Large-Scale Technology Operations.

6. Hands-on AI practitioner with experience deploying enterprise-scale AI solutions including mobile applications, PWAs, workflow automation, voice bots, WhatsApp bots, and agentic AI pilots across HR, Finance, Procurement, and Operations.

7. Successfully delivered multiple large-scale digital transformation programs including Oracle, SAP, Microsoft D365, NCR Aloha, Crunchtime, eCommerce, mobile platforms, kiosks, shared services, and cloud modernization initiatives.

8. Strong commercial and operational leader with experience managing large budgets, vendor ecosystems, technology sourcing, contract negotiations, governance, and P&L accountability.

9. Award-winning technology executive, including NASSCOM's "India 3.0 IT Innovation of the Year" and multiple CIO100 and industry leadership recognitions.

10. Extensive cross-industry experience spanning logistics, maritime, aviation, restaurants, retail, manufacturing, telecom, banking, financial services, government, and technology services.
